script_overview.title: 秘阁残卷
script_overview.logline: 《推背图》残卷失窃，秘阁暗藏党争杀机，谁在伪造天机？
script_overview.case_summary: 北宋汴京，朝廷秘阁失窃《推背图》残卷。表面为盗贼夜闯，实则牵涉朝中党争。调查发现，残卷被调包，真本藏于翰林学士府中，而枢密院暗线欲借此诬陷政敌，引发朝局动荡。
script_overview.public_objective: 查明《推背图》残卷失窃真相，追回真本。
script_overview.player_briefing: 你可以查验现场、询问相关人物、整理线索并在最后作出取舍。

playable_identities.description: 北宋地方文吏，熟悉文书、印记和交接规程。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 有权查验案发现场与相关簿册。
playable_identities.motive: 厘清文书失误背后的责任，避免无辜者被牵连。
limitations: 不能提前公开未证实的真相
playable_identities.background: 你随官署入场，既要顾及规程，也要找出真正能站住脚的证据。

playable_identities.description: 北宋驿路差人，熟悉行旅、马匹与夜间出入痕迹。
playable_identities.relation_to_case: 能接触驿路、仓房、后门与差役口供。
playable_identities.motive: 证明自己没有卷入案中，同时找出真正破坏规程的人。
limitations: 身份低微，不能强逼高阶人物认罪
playable_identities.background: 你在驿路上见过太多仓促交接，知道细节比响亮口供更可靠。

rules: 文书、印记、口供与现场物证需要相互印证。
人物只会透露自己在当前阶段能够合理知道的内容。

story.surface_event: 秘阁《推背图》残卷被盗，现场留有撬锁痕迹与一枚铜符。
story.hidden_truth: 残卷并未失窃，而是被翰林学士王洙暗中调换，欲以伪本献媚圣上，真本藏于其书房暗格。枢密院暗线张尧佐得知后，派刺客夜闯秘阁，制造失窃假象，欲嫁祸王洙。
story.culprit_boundary: 真凶和包庇者必须通过完整证据链确认，任何单一口供都不足以下结论。

clues.title: 铜符
clues.display_text: 秘阁现场发现的铜制令牌，刻有‘枢密’字样
clues.detail: 此铜符为枢密院夜间通行凭证，数量有限，可追查持有人。

clues.title: 撬锁痕迹
clues.display_text: 秘阁门锁上的金属划痕
clues.detail: 痕迹方向由外向内，但锁簧完好，疑似用钥匙开锁后伪造。

clues.title: 车辙印
clues.display_text: 东华门外深陷的车辙
clues.detail: 车辙宽度与枢密院马车相符，且辙印深于常车，显示载重物。

clues.title: 残茶盏
clues.display_text: 秘阁值房桌上的茶盏
clues.detail: 茶盏边缘有褐色痕迹，经查验为安神药残渣，暗示当夜有人下药。

clues.title: 伪本书页
clues.display_text: 王洙书房书案上摊开的半卷《推背图》
clues.detail: 纸张较新，墨迹未干，与真本年代不符，且内容有篡改。

clues.title: 暗格痕迹
clues.display_text: 王洙书房博古架后的细微划痕
clues.detail: 划痕呈方形，与暗格边缘吻合，显示此处近期被开启。

clues.title: 密信残角
clues.display_text: 张尧佐案头未封口的密信
clues.detail: 信上写有‘推背’二字，内容提及‘伪本已就，可行动矣’。

clues.title: 灰烬纸角
clues.display_text: 张尧佐密室火盆中的未燃尽纸片
clues.detail: 纸片上书‘伪本已就’，与密信笔迹相同。

clues.title: 赵佶记录口供记录
clues.highlight_text: 赵佶记录记录口供记录
clues.display_text: 赵佶关于当夜情况的陈述笔录
clues.detail: 赵佶称自己当晚曾见王洙独自进入秘阁，约半个时辰后离开。

clues.title: 陈婆手记残页
clues.display_text: 陈婆私下记录的王府杂事
clues.detail: 残页上写有‘老爷夜入书房，开暗格，取一木匣’等字。

clues.title: 药渣
clues.display_text: 值房茶壶中残留的药渣
clues.detail: 经查验为曼陀罗花籽，有致昏作用，与残茶盏中的安神药相符。

clues.title: 真本残卷
clues.display_text: 王洙书房暗格中的紫檀木匣内所藏
clues.detail: 纸张古旧，墨迹自然，与秘阁藏书目录记载相符，确为真本。

clues.title: 铜符
clues.display_text: 秘阁现场发现的铜制令牌，刻有‘枢密’字样
clues.detail: 此铜符为枢密院夜间通行凭证，数量有限，可追查持有人。

clues.title: 撬锁痕迹
clues.display_text: 秘阁门锁上的金属划痕
clues.detail: 痕迹方向由外向内，但锁簧完好，疑似用钥匙开锁后伪造。

clues.title: 车辙印
clues.display_text: 东华门外深陷的车辙
clues.detail: 车辙宽度与枢密院马车相符，且辙印深于常车，显示载重物。

clues.title: 残茶盏
clues.display_text: 秘阁值房桌上的茶盏
clues.detail: 茶盏边缘有褐色痕迹，经查验为安神药残渣，暗示当夜有人下药。

clues.title: 伪本书页
clues.display_text: 王洙书房书案上摊开的半卷《推背图》
clues.detail: 纸张较新，墨迹未干，与真本年代不符，且内容有篡改。

clues.title: 暗格痕迹
clues.display_text: 王洙书房博古架后的细微划痕
clues.detail: 划痕呈方形，与暗格边缘吻合，显示此处近期被开启。

clues.title: 密信残角
clues.display_text: 张尧佐案头未封口的密信
clues.detail: 信上写有‘推背’二字，内容提及‘伪本已就，可行动矣’。

clues.title: 灰烬纸角
clues.display_text: 张尧佐密室火盆中的未燃尽纸片
clues.detail: 纸片上书‘伪本已就’，与密信笔迹相同。

clues.title: 赵佶记录口供记录

deductions.question: 秘阁门锁的撬锁痕迹与铜符，揭示了什么矛盾？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 证据不足，请仔细比对痕迹方向与铜符来源。
deductions.success_text: 撬锁痕迹为伪造，实为用钥匙开门后伪造，而铜符为枢密院所有，暗示内部人员作案。

deductions.question: 值房的残茶盏与药渣，说明了什么？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 线索不完整，请分析茶盏与药渣的关系。
deductions.success_text: 当夜有人对值宿官员下药致昏，以便潜入秘阁。

deductions.question: 东华门的车辙印与枢密院的密信残角，指向谁？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 车辙与密信需结合分析，注意时间与内容。
deductions.success_text: 枢密院马车深夜出城，密信提及‘行动’，暗示张尧佐派人制造失窃假象。

deductions.question: 陈婆的手记残页与暗格痕迹，揭示了什么？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请确认暗格位置与手记内容的一致性。
deductions.success_text: 王洙书房暗格近期被开启，内藏真本，证实其私藏行为。

deductions.question: 张尧密室中的灰烬纸角与密信残角，有何联系？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 笔迹比对是关键，请仔细查看。
deductions.success_text: 灰烬纸角与密信笔迹相同，证明张尧佐在销毁证据，密信为行动指令。

deductions.question: 综合所有线索，真本残卷最终藏于何处？谁策划了失窃案？
deductions.wrong_feedback: 请确认真本位置与幕后主使。
deductions.success_text: 真本藏于王洙书房暗格，失窃案由张尧佐策划，欲嫁祸王洙。

deductions.question: 「铜符」「撬锁痕迹」「车辙印」共同指向案发前后的哪条关键事实？

choices.title: 揭发王洙
choices.description: 将王洙私藏真本、伪造残卷之事禀报圣上

choices.title: 揭发张尧佐
choices.description: 将张尧佐策划失窃、诬陷王洙之事禀报圣上

choices.title: 调和党争
choices.description: 暗中促成双方和解，平息事态

choices.title: 私藏真本
choices.description: 将真本据为己有，销毁证据

choices.title: 上报朝廷
choices.description: 如实上报所有发现，由圣上裁决

endings.title: 真相大白
endings.result_summary: 王洙与张尧佐皆被惩处，真本归还秘阁。
endings.ending_text: 圣上震怒，王洙以欺君之罪贬谪岭南，张尧佐以诬陷之罪罢官流放。秘阁重修典藏，残卷归位。
endings.history_echo: 庆历党争暂缓，但朝中暗流未息。

endings.title: 党争加剧
endings.result_summary: 一方被扳倒，另一方独大，朝局失衡。
endings.ending_text: 若只揭发王洙，张尧佐得势，更加专横；若只揭发张尧佐，王洙一派独大，党争愈烈。
endings.history_echo: 此后数年，朝中党同伐异，国事日非。

endings.title: 暗中调和
endings.result_summary: 双方暂时妥协，但隐患犹存。
endings.ending_text: 你促成王洙交出真本，张尧佐销毁伪证，二人表面和解。但仇恨的种子已然埋下。
endings.history_echo: 不久后，王洙遭人弹劾，张尧佐亦被参，朝局再起波澜。

endings.title: 私吞真本
endings.result_summary: 你独吞真本，成为最大赢家。
endings.ending_text: 你销毁所有证据，将真本藏于私宅。无人知晓真相，但夜半时分，你常梦见秘阁中散落的书卷。
endings.history_echo: 数年后，你因他事获罪，真本流落民间，不知所踪。

endings.title: 圣裁公允
endings.result_summary: 圣上明断，双方各受其罚，真本归位。
endings.ending_text: 圣上亲审此案，明察秋毫，王洙、张尧佐皆伏法。秘阁增派守卫，残卷重归书阁。
endings.history_echo: 朝野称颂圣明，党争稍息，但庆历新政仍步履维艰。

visual_assets.title: 秘阁主舞台图
visual_assets.prompt: 北宋 historical mystery game main scene, quiet private evidence investigation tableau, wide 16:9 landscape composition for a game stage, not square, not vertical, not portrait format, no black side padding. The image must be staged inside a quiet side chamber or sheltered courtyard around a mid-foreground evidence table, tray, stone step, or ground patch with concrete clue props on it. PRIMARY SUBJECT: exactly one visible adult human NPC in historical clothing stands beside the evidence zone and looks toward the viewer, front-facing or three-quarter front view; full face visible, direct eye contact, eyes nose and mouth visible, full upper body visible, no cropped head, no cropped chin, no oversized torso crop, never rear view, never back-facing, never face-hidden, never looking away. The main person should occupy about 20-32 percent of the frame width so the environment and clue objects remain visible. Use only quiet dynasty-appropriate room or courtyard background architecture, not a literal illustration of the location description and not a distant exterior establishing shot. Human count rule: exactly one main foreground NPC; at most one tiny background attendant; no other people. Do not make a crowd scene, army formation, cavalry scene, battlefield, parade, line of troops, street procession, or guard corridor. Do not draw guard lines, troop formations, massed soldiers, horse teams, city-gate queues, ceremonial entrances, flags, banners, weapons, or military staging even if the story location mentions them. At least one named NPC from this list must be foreground-visible, full-body or waist-up, face and hands visible, occupying 20-32 percent of the frame width, in the same perspective and light: 王洙 (appearance lock: 王洙：中年文士，蓄长须，着紫袍); 张尧佐 (appearance lock: 张尧佐：武将身材，面有刀疤，着绯袍). No additional NPC groups may stand nearby; people must not become rows or silhouettes. Clickable evidence objects must be clear, visible, and close to the center third of the image: 铜符; 赵佶记录记录口供记录（用于表现抽象线索“赵佶记录口供记录”的具体可见物证）; 伪本书页; 铜符. Top-priority evidence slot contract: place these props as physical objects at the matching normalized image positions and keep them recognizable: 铜符: slot_08, x=50%, y=42%, central table evidence zone; 赵佶记录记录口供记录（用于表现抽象线索“赵佶记录口供记录”的具体可见物证）: slot_12, x=35%, y=50%, center-left mid-ground evidence zone; 伪本书页: slot_14, x=65%, y=50%, center-right mid-ground evidence zone; 铜符: slot_18, x=50%, y=58%, lower central safe evidence zone. Each evidence object must physically appear in the environment as a concrete prop, not as an abstract idea, not a label, not a timeline, not a diagram. Create a visible evidence zone in the middle third of the scene, such as a small table, tray, stone step, or ground patch near the main NPC, containing the named evidence objects as separate recognizable props; do not place evidence on sky, roof, high wall, signboard, plaque, or decorative text area. Keep important evidence away from image edges and away from UI-safe bottom space; leave enough empty air around each evidence object for hotspot markers. Never output an empty room, empty street, empty courtyard, object-only room, landscape-only view, architecture-only view, or horse-only scene; every scene needs a visible named human suspect or witness. NPCs, buildings, furniture, and evidence share one coherent historical light source and dynasty costume system. Dynasty material audit: Northern Song props only: ceramic wine cups and jars, lacquered wood, bamboo, silk, hemp cloth, bronze or iron tools, paper documents shown closed or sealed, oil lamps, wooden furniture, tiled roofs, and period robes. Strictly forbid laboratory glassware, conical flasks, Erlenmeyer flasks, beakers, test tubes, modern glass bottles, plastic, electric lights, printed modern labels, modern furniture, and Western modern clothing. If the location contains a gate, shop, office, room entrance, inn entrance, archive, or hall, keep all lintels and panels blank; no signboard, no plaque, no banner, no readable characters above doors. Style must match NPC portraits and clue cards: grounded Chinese historical mystery illustration, restrained realistic brushwork, no anime, no chibi, no random modern concept-art style. Use a grounded investigation camera and readable silhouettes. No modern objects, no watermark, no generated readable text, no Chinese characters, no calligraphy, no plaques, no banners, no signboards, no text-like decoration. Post-generation self-check: wide landscape ratio; main NPC centered with full face and upper body visible but not oversized; central evidence objects visible at declared slots; dynasty props only; unified style; image successfully generated. Style: 低饱和, 北宋, 历史悬疑. Contract: scene_requires_visible_npcs; scene_requires_visible_clue_objects; scene_requires_centered_full_face_upper_body; scene_requires_centered_clue_objects; scene_requires_declared_safe_hotspot_slots; hotspot_layout_contract_v2; visual_style_unified_across_scene_npc_clue; post_generation_visual_self_check_required; script_visual_contract_v4.
